generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; fitness GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: This GTM extension uses public sources and local base-report facts. Private-company revenue, founder self-funding, unit economics and losses are included only when a source gives a concrete amount; unsupported amounts are deliberately omitted.

founder_background: Léo Desrumaux: TechCrunch identifies Desrumaux as co-founder/CEO; French/Austin-Paris context and boxing motivation appear in interviews.
Sam Bowen: TechCrunch reports former hardware engineering VP experience at Amazon, Peloton and Tonal as adviser.
brand_timeline: 2024-12: funding $4.75M - Seed funding from Skip Capital, Kima Ventures, Teampact Ventures and angels including Ciryl Gane.
2025: crowdfunding $144K+ - Local base report records Kickstarter at $144K+ and 658+ backers during campaign; verify final amount before using in investor-grade deck.
2026-02: planned_delivery $4,500 MSRP - The Verge reports planned upfront price and first delivery timeline is tied to preorder schedule.

founder_profiles.name: Léo Desrumaux
founder_profiles.background_summary: TechCrunch identifies Desrumaux as co-founder/CEO; French/Austin-Paris context and boxing motivation appear in interviews.

founder_profiles.name: Sam Bowen
founder_profiles.background_summary: TechCrunch reports former hardware engineering VP experience at Amazon, Peloton and Tonal as adviser.

capital_history.description: Seed funding from Skip Capital, Kima Ventures, Teampact Ventures and angels including Ciryl Gane.
Local base report records Kickstarter at $144K+ and 658+ backers during campaign; verify final amount before using in investor-grade deck.
The Verge reports planned upfront price and first delivery timeline is tied to preorder schedule.

source.title: The Verge GROWL pricing and product report

research_gaps: No real post-delivery churn, NPS, defect rate or revenue yet.
Founder personal cash input and burn rate are not reliably public.

gtm_extension.summary: Growl 的 GTM 是“AI 投影拳击教练 + 高端家庭硬件 + 预购/众筹”的早期赌注。它试图做拳击版 Peloton/Tonal，但当前仍是未大规模交付阶段：价格、融资、顾问和媒体报道可核验，真实留存、故障率、内容质量和售后成本还不能硬写。它现在更像待验证的高端承诺，而不是成熟规模化案例。
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: Growl 的 GTM 是“AI 投影拳击教练 + 高端家庭硬件 + 预购/众筹”的早期赌注。
channel_path: 种子轮和顾问阵容建立可信度
The Verge/TechCrunch 等媒体同步曝光
预购和 Kickstarter 收集早期需求
Austin showroom/体验降低高价疑虑
2026 首批交付后才进入真实口碑阶段

channels.dtc: 官方独立站或官方票务页承接高意向购买。
channels.pr_media: 评测、报道、创始人资料和公开数据库提供基础信任。
channels.community: 用户评价、成绩榜、课程社区或赛事照片决定口碑扩散。
channels.partners: 经销商、合作健身房、顾问、赞助商或明星投资人提供第二层信任。
channels.service: 售后、安装、退换、维修和交付节奏决定高客单价是否可持续。
channels.crowdfunding: Kickstarter 用低目标验证早期需求。
channels.showroom: Austin showroom 解决“原型机是否真实”疑虑。

business_model.pricing_logic: 定价接近 Tonal 而非 FightCamp，用“实体可打 AI 教练”解释溢价。
business_model.channel_economics: 种子轮 $4.75M 对复杂硬件非常紧，预购现金和交付节奏关键。

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: 最多选 3 个产品线；按用户购买决策、价格结构、GTM 学习价值和公开证据选择。

top_products.name: GROWL Wall-mounted AI boxing trainer
top_products.why_selected: 品牌全部叙事集中在这个硬件上。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。
top_products.pre_market: 上市或预售前的关键动作是明确用户要替代什么：私教、健身房、精品团课、拳击馆、赛事报名，还是一台传统器械。
top_products.innovation: 4K projector、hit sensors、3D motion tracking、可击打表面。
top_products.breakout: 突破点不只在产品参数，而在价格结构、渠道叙事和真实用户可验证的交付结果。
top_products.customer_impact: 用户购买时会同时计算硬件价、配件价、服务费、软件/订阅边界、竞品总成本和售后风险。
top_products.ecosystem_impact: 它改变了同类品牌解释价值的方式：要么证明自己更专业，要么证明自己总拥有成本更低。

pricing_model.product_price: The Verge reports upfront hardware about $4,500.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: If purchased upfront, The Verge reports planned subscription about $60/month.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: wall installation, punching surface wear, sensors, projector and support are critical future service costs; exact replacement fees not yet evidenced.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: FightCamp packages start $299 and historical full package $1,219 with $39/mo; Tonal 2 $4,295 + $59.95/mo; Speediance GM2 $3,390-$4,799; Peloton Bike $1,695 + $49.99/mo.

sources.title: The Verge GROWL pricing and product report

what_to_learn: 先把用户的替代对象讲清楚，再决定硬件复杂度和渠道顺序。
价格表必须包含产品本体、配件/服务、软件/订阅和竞品总成本。
GTM 的重点不是曝光，而是让用户相信交付、售后和长期内容能兑现。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把众筹、疫情红利或媒体报道当成长期留存。
不要在没有可靠来源时补写创始人自筹金额、单台毛利或亏损数字。

sources.title: The Verge GROWL pricing and product report

top_products.name: GROWL financing family access plan
top_products.why_selected: 高价硬件需要月付包装才可能进入家庭预算。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。
top_products.pre_market: 上市或预售前的关键动作是明确用户要替代什么：私教、健身房、精品团课、拳击馆、赛事报名，还是一台传统器械。
top_products.innovation: 用 $150-$190/mo 降低一次性支付心理阻力。
top_products.breakout: 突破点不只在产品参数，而在价格结构、渠道叙事和真实用户可验证的交付结果。
top_products.customer_impact: 用户购买时会同时计算硬件价、配件价、服务费、软件/订阅边界、竞品总成本和售后风险。

pricing_model.product_price: The Verge reports anticipated $150/mo for 48 months or $190/mo for 36 months, totaling about $7,200 or $6,840.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Plan includes unlimited family access per The Verge; subscription boundary differs from upfront $60/mo plan.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: plan may include hardware and content; damage, installation and replacement terms need contract confirmation.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Peloton Tread+ four-year total in The Verge comparison about $7,407; Tonal rental official page $219/mo first 3 months then $279/mo; FightCamp is far cheaper upfront.

top_products.why_selected: 如果硬件交付，内容和 AI 才是长期留存。

pricing_model.product_price: Content sold through subscription or financing bundle, not as standalone verified price.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Subscription/software fee: planned $60/mo if upfront hardware purchased; financing bundle includes family access.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: camera/projector calibration and bag surface replacement may become service costs; no fixed public price written.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor subscription comparison: FightCamp $39/mo historical, Peloton $49.99/mo, Tonal $59.95/mo, Speediance optional $19.99/mo.

learning_summary: Growl 目前是承诺型 GTM，不是已验证规模化 GTM。
它必须用交付质量证明 $4,500 + 订阅合理。
与 FightCamp 对比时，最重要的是真实训练效果和售后交付。
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: 没有可靠金额来源的创始人自筹、单台毛利、广告花费、退货损失不写入事实表，只在研究缺口中说明。

sources.title: The Verge GROWL pricing and product report
